Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json
import sys

# Read the JSONL file line by line looking for briefing content
with open\("C:/Users/shaba/.claude/projects/C--Users-shaba-Desktop-projecten-henry/a3a99598-0e07-4ef1-a0c1-f29c713c1f15.jsonl", "r"\) as f:
    for i, line in enumerate\(f\):
        try:
            data = json.loads\(line\)
            if isinstance\(data, dict\) and "message" in data:
                msg = data.get\("message", {}\)
                if isinstance\(msg, dict\):
                    content = msg.get\("content", ""\)
                    if isinstance\(content, str\) and \("briefing" in content.lower\(\) or "French" in content or "Spanish" in content or "Indonesian" in content or "Suriname" in content\):
                        print\(f"Line {i}:"\)
                        print\(content[:2000]\)
                        print\("\\n---\\n"\)
        except:
            pass
        
        if i > 100:  # Check first 100 lines
            break
EOF)
